content:
### Bug fix: Route existing search through pipeline
### AppState update

## Dependency Chain

```
M3  (GraphStore impl)  ──┐
                          ├──► M3.2 (RAG Pipeline)
M3.1 (GenerationEngine) ─┘
```

M3.2 can partially function without M3.1 — `context()` mode works without `GenerationEngine`. Only `ask()` mode requires M3.1.


## Test Strategy

| Component | Approach |
|-----------|----------|
| `VectorRetriever` | Unit test: MockEngine + LiteStore (same pattern as ContextBuilder tests) |
| `GraphExpandRetriever` | Unit test: MockEngine + LiteStore + LiteGraphStore |
| `StructuredAugmenter` | Pure unit test: `Vec<SearchResult>` → formatted string, no I/O |
| `TokenEstimator` | Unit test: chars/4 heuristic, budget enforcement |
| `RagPipeline` | Integration test: mock all three traits, verify orchestration + trace |
| REST/MCP endpoints | Extend existing server tests with new endpoints |
| E2E with Ollama | Integration test (skip if unavailable): full vector → augment → generate |
